title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM ONE HUNDRED EIGHT, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, PAGE ONE HUNDRED NINETY-FIVE, PARAGRAPH g, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3298 / 57 OG No. 7, 1198 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2808, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM ONE HUNDRED EIGHT, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, PAGE ONE HUNDRED NINETY-FIVE, PARAGRAPH g, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item one hundred eight, for the Province of Iloilo, page one hundred ninety-five, paragraph

g

, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"

108. Sta. Barbara Barrio School Building

Igbaras.......................................... P6,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
